title: United States commemorates 250 years of independence amid celebrations, controversies, and a heat wave
summary: The nation reflects on its history of expansion, slavery, and political divisions while facing a heat wave that affects patriotic events.

title: Six years after the Kyushu floods, communities remember victims with ceremonies and reflect on reconstruction
summary: Residents and authorities hold flower offerings and light lanterns in memory of the deceased, while challenges to ensure safe housing persist.

title: Shohei Ohtani allows three runs and exits with arm discomfort; Dodgers win comeback
summary: The Japanese star opened as a pitcher and batter, but was pulled in the seventh inning due to biceps discomfort, while his team secured the victory.

title: Cape Verde falls to Argentina in a close match in the World Cup
summary: The African team fought into extra time and earned applause for their performance, while Messi extended his record of historic goals.

title: Alert for torrential rain and landslide risk in northern Kyushu
summary: Authorities warn about the possibility of sediment disasters and floods due to the stagnation of a rain front.

title: Taylor Swift gets married in New York with a massive celebration
summary: The American singer got married in Manhattan, with a reception of over a thousand guests and a message on electronic screens.

title: Egypt advances to the World Cup round of 16 after winning on penalties
summary: Mohamed Salah led his team and secured qualification, describing the achievement as a beautiful story for the Egyptian people.

title: Keiko Fujimori wins Peru's presidential election on her fourth attempt
summary: After a close contest, the right-wing candidate promises to restore order in a country that has had eight presidents in ten years.

title: Iran holds state funeral for former Supreme Leader Khamenei with international attendance
summary: Thousands of citizens and delegations from over 100 countries participate in the ayatollah's funeral, amid regional tensions.

title: Harassment scandal in a Fuji TV drama generates controversy and reactions on social media
summary: Actors and their representatives confirm the harassment allegations, while others involved deny them, sparking a wave of online defamation.

title: A bear causes the closure of a highway in Akita for more than three hours
summary: The animal got into a vehicle and remained on the road, forcing police to cut off traffic until it managed to escape into the forest.

title: Tibetan self-immolates in front of UN headquarters in protest against China's ethnic policy
summary: The activist denounced China's 'ethnic unity' law, in an act that has caused shock and adds to numerous similar cases.

title: Lionel Messi sets new World Cup records with eight consecutive matches scoring
summary: The Argentine captain reaches 20 historic goals in World Cups and leads his team to the round of 16.

title: Extreme climate phenomena: atmospheric river and El Niño increase weather risks
summary: Scientists warn about the increase in torrential rain and heat waves due to the activation of these climate patterns.

title: Russia intensifies its offensive in Ukraine and seeks to consolidate its international influence
summary: The Russian army claims to have taken a key position in Ukraine, while Putin visits the conflict zone and a traditional ally moves closer to the West.

title: Protests in Okinawa over US military plans and the Henoko accident
summary: While documents on the planned use of Naha Airport are revealed, residents hold a large protest against the construction of a new base.

title: The 'Abare Matsuri' festival kicks off the recovery of the Noto region
summary: The traditional torch festival aims to revitalize the area affected by population decline, while promoting cultural exchange.

title: Chiba X Games bring together top extreme athletes with outstanding Japanese performance
summary: Olympic athlete Kokoro Yoshizawa wins her first medal and Mio Ozawa takes gold in women's BMX, in the first edition of the event in Japan.

title: Croatia says goodbye to the World Cup after a controversial refereeing decision with technology
summary: The Balkan team was eliminated in a match where a goal disallowed by sensor generated debate, and Modric played his last World Cup match.

title: The Hokuriku Shinkansen project remains stalled on the Obama route, with historical roots
summary: Decades after the original plans, the high-speed line is still not completed, generating frustration in local communities.
